blocks.text: Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat. Turn ignition to ON mode. Verify that HDS communicates with the vehicle. If it does not communicate Inspect the data link circuitry.
Select "Meter" in HDS and choose "Adjustment" from the "Test Mode Menu". Select "Read Data" from "Rewrite Meter" on the menu screen to extract data from the combination meter before replacement.

Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat. Turn ignition to ON mode. Verify that HDS communicates with the vehicle and ECU. If it does not communicate Inspect the data link circuitry.

Select "Meter" in HDS and choose "Adjustment" from the "Test Mode Menu". Select "Write Data" from "Rewrite Meter" on the menu screen to transfer the data to the new combination meter. After the work is successfully completed, the od data is automatically erased from HDS.
